ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., petite, regular, plus) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of the size (e.g., junior, adult, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the clothing item (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "item_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the clothing item (e.g., t-shirt, jeans, skirt) */,
  "item_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the clothing item (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "item_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the clothing item (e.g., adult, child, infant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "brand_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being measured */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being measured */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, length, shoulder width) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_group" TEXT /* Group of the measurement type (e.g., body, garment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item in the inventory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in the inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_state" TEXT /* State of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "shipping_tracking" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item being returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was made */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_cards" (
  "gift_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gift card */,
  "gift_card_number" TEXT /* Number of the gift card */,
  "gift_card_balance" REAL /* Balance of the gift card */,
  "gift_card_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the gift card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gift_card_id")
)
